purpose: Define safe permission boundaries for proposed ULTRON agents before any functional or autonomous agents are created.

permission_levels.description: Can inspect approved public-safe context only.
Can propose ideas, structure and next steps without acting.
Can draft documents, checklists or policies for human review.
Can act only after explicit human approval and a manual execution path.

human_approval_required_for: Any file modification involving sensitive material
Any knowledge transfer to another project
agent_creation_rules: Every agent must have a named purpose
Every agent must list allowed inputs and outputs
Every agent must list blocked capabilities
Every agent must define its maximum permission level
Every agent must require human approval for actions
No agent may use credentials in Public Demo Mode
escalation_rules: Private data handling defaults to BLOCKED
External tool access defaults to NEEDS_REVIEW
